subtitle: Disaster & Climate Risk
seismicWarning: High intensity seismic event. Local populations advised to stay alert for minor structural stress and potential localized aftershocks.
climate2026: ⚡ Baseline risks: Focus on rising regional temperatures and coastal micro-flooding in Northern Java and parts of Sumatra.
climate2030: ⚠️ Medium risk: Accelerated sea-level rise models predict ~12cm elevations. Coastlines near Jakarta face recurrent tidal stress.
climate2040: 🔥 High risk: Heightened thermal anomalies. Elevated drought frequencies across Kalimantan risk increasing forest peat fire indices.
climate2050: 🚨 Extreme scenario: Temperature deviation reaches +1.8°C regionally. Major coastal buffer displacement and severe weather disruptions.
jakartaDesc: Vulnerable to extreme tidal inundation and soil subsidence.
sumatraDesc: Erosion stress and brackish aquifer infiltration.
kalimantanDesc: Intense thermal anomalies resulting in seasonal haze.
surabayaDesc: Elevated storm surge and industrial port marsh flooding.
